data.name: Welcome to a Sexy, Open World!
data.detailed_description:
Story

When he awakens from a terrible accident, Sejima Seiya finds himself in another world—Laurentide.

A world with a legend, long held by its people:

──The seed that shall give birth to heroes and end the era of war shall come from another world.──

Seiya has that seed within him.

And despite being viewed as breeding stock, he still wishes to have sex.
But now the father of the future heroes could become king of the world.

So...

Drawn by the legend, beautiful women gather from across the world, seeking his seed.

──Or perhaps some harbor the ambition of unifying the world under their motherland.

──Or perhaps some simply desire sex with Seiya.

Regardless, Seiya's days of getting milked by beautiful women have begun...

Features

  • Traditional Visual Novel with multiple heroines

  • Over 2,000 CGs and variations to explore!

  • 20+ hours of average reading time

  • By the creator of Princess Evangile and Imouto Paradise!

  • Includes bonus content: Maternity Dress Patch!

data.short_description: A visual novel from the creators of Imouto Paradise & Princess Evangile! Sejima Seiya was sent into a completely different world by a truck accident. In this world, Seiya finds himself caught up in an ancient prophecy that someone from another world will arrive to give birth to the legendary heroes.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 and up
  • 處理器: Core2Duo
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: VRAM 32MB
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: PCM
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: VRAM 128MB

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7 and up
  • Processor: Core2Duo
  • Memory: 512 MB RAM
  • Graphics: VRAM 32MB
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
  • Sound Card: PCM
